name: seosanch-cell
description: Cloudflare Pages cell member care manager.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist/pages --project-name church-cell-manager --branch main
scripts.types:notifications: npx wrangler types --config wrangler.notifications.jsonc --env-interface CallNotePushEnv --include-runtime false worker-configuration.notifications.d.ts
scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/memos.js && node --check public/auth.js && node --check public/pwa.js && node --check public/sw.js && node --check functions/_webauthn.js && node --check functions/_middleware.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js && node --check lib/notification-crypto.js && node --check lib/mobile-memo-auth.js && node --check lib/relay-auth.js && node --check lib/relay-client.js && node --check lib/relay-enrollment-code.js && node --check lib/relay-enrollment-api.js && node --check lib/site-identity.js && node --check lib/call-note-notification-api.js && node --check lib/web-push-notification-api.js && node --check workers/call-note-push/index.js
